summary: xAI Grok 4.5 launch dominates with multi-platform coverage; Microsoft Copilot OS leaks and DeepSeek V4 adoption are key mainstream signals. Security themes strong: Codex subagent encryption, Anthropic covert tracking, local agent auditors. User workflow signals around Claude Code alternatives, Codex rate limits, and multi-agent orchestration. | Anthropic details Claude Code's origin and containment strategies; JetBrains launches Kotlin AI coding benchmark; Mistral unveils Vibe coding agent; Daytona raises $24M for agent sandboxes; Google ADK Go 2.0 for multi-agent apps; OpenAI releases GPT-5.6 family (Sol, Terra, Luna). | Recent agent ecosystem releases: Claude Code, Cline, OpenHands, Browser-use, Vercel AI SDK, OpenAI Codex alpha, etc. Infra: mitos sandbox, open-agent-hub. No user workflow reports. Gaps: social/discussion, user field reports. | Packages shard shows strong mainstream product releases (OpenAI Codex CLI, GitHub Copilot CLI, HashiCorp Terraform MCP server) and a wave of infra primitives in eval, security, memory, and observability. No user workflow field reports in this shard.

candidates.title: Anthropic: The Making of Claude Code
candidates.why_it_matters: Inside story of Claude Code from internal CLI to product, detailing design decisions and early user feedback.

candidates.why_it_matters: Engineering containment strategies for agent blast radius across claude.ai and Claude Code.

candidates.title: JetBrains Kotlin Benchmark for AI Coding Agents
candidates.why_it_matters: New benchmark evaluating AI coding agents on real-world Kotlin tasks, directly relevant to agent evaluation.

candidates.why_it_matters: Mistral launches Vibe coding agent with terminal/IDE/background modes, expanding agent product lineup.

candidates.why_it_matters: Funding signals infra demand for agent compute environments; sandbox firewall and Stripe integration launched.

candidates.why_it_matters: New graph-based workflow engine and human-in-the-loop for building reliable multi-agent applications.

candidates.why_it_matters: New model family with tiered capabilities; Sol, Terra, Luna models now available via Vercel AI Gateway.

candidates.title: Supabase: Agentic Coding with OpenCode
candidates.why_it_matters: Supabase integrates OpenCode for agentic coding workflows on their platform, bridging database and agent tooling.
